Account.Name: Chase Checking
Account.Description: Primary checking — Chase bank. Receives paycheck direct deposits and tutoring payments.

Account.Description: Emergency fund and tuition buffer.

Account.Description: One-off freelance IT support sessions billed to individual clients.

Account.Description: CS textbooks, practice problem sets, and reference materials for tutoring prep.

Account.Description: DigitalOcean hosting, GitHub Pro, JetBrains IDE for budget tracker app.

Account.Name: Transportation
Account.Description: CTA transit passes for commuting to tutoring sessions on campus.
